data.body: B1 MERGED (#459). B2 implemented (contextvar sink at _seam.append_event; importer passes 1/2a/2c/2d batched, 2b/2e per-event) + tests; pushed Gerrit #479. B4 implemented (commit-count benchmark N=3000 -> 2*ceil(3000/256)=24 commits, malformed-chunk rollback, crash-resume K=2/source_id) + tests; pushed Gerrit #480 (stacked on #479). Local: make lint + typecheck GREEN, full default suite GREEN (unit+interfaces+import 57 tests), integration-tier B4 tests GREEN. Auto-submit watcher running for the stack (submit in order, close each child after Verified +1).
